name: reject-unknown-event-type
description: event_type is not a syntactically-valid absolute URI per spec §1.4.5 (bare token, no scheme). The log MUST reject with 400. NOTE: The case filename is preserved for backward compatibility; "unknown" here means structurally malformed, not "URI not in atrib normative set" — extension URIs that are syntactically valid are accepted (see accept-extension-event-type.json).
